rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims and notes on what cannot be verified from the text alone.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (generalization scope).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but not every edit is traced.
